description: The Marines assault the beaches of Betio Island. Heavy resistance expected on all sectors.
Advance through the jungles of Peleliu and secure the enemy stronghold.
Secure the airfield on Peleliu under heavy mortar fire. Extraction is not an option.
Fight alongside Reznov in the ruins of Stalingrad. One shot. One kill.
Push through the Russian countryside and drive the enemy back.
Use flamethrowers to clear fortified positions in the jungle.
Fight through the industrial district of Stalingrad. No surrender.
Command a tank through enemy lines and break the siege.
Defend the outskirts of Berlin against overwhelming forces.
Clear buildings in Berlin block by block. Room by room.
Fly a PBY Catalina on a rescue mission through enemy waters.
Assault Okinawa's beaches and clear the cave networks.
Fight through the caves of Okinawa. The enemy is cornered.
Storm the Reichstag. This is the final push.
The final assault on Berlin. End it.
